description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of 'Feed Me Vegan' Vegan Curry, featuring a predominantly teal-green color scheme. The front displays a large, appetizing image of a bowl of vegan curry with a golden spoon, accompanied by bold white and yellow text highlighting the product name and key attributes such as 'vegan', 'gluten free', and 'under 500 calories'. The back of the box features a photo of a woman preparing food in a kitchen, alongside detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and cooking instructions. The sides of the box are mostly teal with vertical branding and barcode labels. The packaging is sleek and modern, designed to attract attention in a retail or urban food setting. The box appears to be sealed and is likely to contain a ready-to-eat or ready-to-cook meal inside.
description: A teal-green rectangular box of 'Feed Me Vegan' Vegan Curry with a food image and detailed branding, featuring nutritional and preparation information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the product name, a bowl of vegan curry, and key selling points in bold text.
description_view_1: Side view displays vertical branding and a barcode, with minimal additional information.
description_view_2: Back view features a kitchen scene with a woman, detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, and cooking instructions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical branding and a barcode, similar to the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Feed Me Vegan' logo is visible on the front and sides, featuring bold white and yellow text on a teal background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the box states 'Vegan Curry' and shows an image of curry, indicating the flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information, ingredients, and cooking instructions are visible on the back of the box.
